title: Book Trilogy Showcase
public_claim: Book Trilogy Showcase is the reader-facing exhibit for a governed three-book manuscript system.
distinctive_mechanism: It presents the trilogy through public book order, canonical IDs, seventy-two chapter profiles, ReaderEdition targets, FinalProof argument backbone, ConstructionKits, PassageTargets, Democratic Dialectic voice material, book-specific registers, chapter shape, bridge logic, dependency logic, terminology controls, visual identity, and rewrite-state limits.
use_value: It matters because a reader should see what the books are arguing and how the chapter system is governed, while also seeing that final public prose admission remains unfinished rather than completed.

component_proofs.claim_supported: keeps the three-book system stable while public titles and presentation language are improved
component_proofs.input: 72 canonical chapter IDs, public book order, book-title logic, and chapter-title state
component_proofs.expected_output: chapter identity ledger and public/canonical mapping
component_proofs.current_evidence: Expected proof artifact: chapter identity ledger and public/canonical mapping
component_proofs.verification_check: Apply Canonical Chapter Identity to one chapter dossier; confirm title, visual, source state, rewrite target, and handoff decision.

component_proofs.claim_supported: identifies what is readable but flattened, generic, or not yet book-appropriate in voice
component_proofs.expected_output: rewrite target with deficits as a reviewable artifact
component_proofs.current_evidence: Expected proof artifact: rewrite target with deficits as a reviewable artifact
component_proofs.verification_check: Apply ReaderEdition Rewrite Target to one chapter dossier; confirm title, visual, source state, rewrite target, and handoff decision.

claim_ceiling: The page may claim proof-structured components and visible verification targets. It may not claim external validation, production deployment, or completed empirical findings unless the project-specific record states those facts.
